_readme: PHASE 3d ENGINE-POWER cycle (ladder5): IDENTICAL to ladder4 (same 83-dim gen-60 warm start, temp anneal 1.0->0.65 over 40 gens, dense VP + placement/farm/reward aux, gamma .999, PPO, 512 games/gen, 60 gens, win-bonus-halflife 8, selfPlayFraction .35, obs v1.2, deflect+final-cap engine, gauntlet-v8) EXCEPT shapingPreset='ascend3'. Michael's correction: the corruption->Fallen spiral is a SYMPTOM, not the disease — corrupting is a legitimate line when the engine backs it; the real deficit is ATTACK POWER (the bot fights with a far weaker dice pool than a strong player, so fights fail and corruptions pay nothing). ascend3 = ascend2 minus the status penalty (status 0) plus attackPower 0.3 = w*clamp01(expectedAttack/20) crediting the dice-pool expected roll; keeps faceDown 0.1; awakened lowered 0.35->0.25 to hold total Phi ~O(1). ladder4 (ascend2, status -0.25) is the ABLATION arm. Both champions hand off for pace tests.
